task_completion.description: Agent logged into the Vicidial administration interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Vicidial administration web interface loaded in a browser.

task_completion.description: MOH Class created with correct ID and Name
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Add A New Music On Hold Class' form or the MOH class details page with MOH ID 'HOLIDAY25' and MOH Name 'Holiday Promo 2025'.
Screenshots of the MOH class configuration show the 'Active' field set to 'Y', 'Random Order' set to 'Y', and 'Admin User Group' set to '---ALL---'.

task_completion.description: Audio file 'holiday_jingle.wav' uploaded to the new class
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the file 'holiday_jingle.wav' selected for upload or successfully listed in the audio files section of the 'HOLIDAY25' MOH class.

task_completion.description: Audio file 'seasonal_offer.wav' uploaded to the new class
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the file 'seasonal_offer.wav' selected for upload or successfully listed in the audio files section of the 'HOLIDAY25' MOH class.

integrity.description: Agent used the Vicidial web interface to configure the MOH class
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with the web browser and Vicidial interface to create the class, rather than using terminal commands or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: Agent uploaded files via the web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The file upload dialog or Vicidial upload interface is visible, indicating files were uploaded through the web application rather than terminal commands like 'cp' or 'mv' to the asterisk directory.

integrity.description: Agent selected files from the correct source directory
integrity.visual_evidence: The file selection dialog shows the files being picked from '/home/ga/Documents/Audio/'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target MOH ID is 'HOLIDAY25' with the name 'Holiday Promo 2025'. The expected audio files to be uploaded are 'holiday_jingle.wav' and 'seasonal_offer.wav'. The files should be uploaded to the 'HOLIDAY25' MOH class via the Vicidial interface, which ultimately places them in '/var/lib/asterisk/mohmp3'.
